summary: Iteration 6: User Management API testing completed - 24/24 tests passed (100%). All 8 requested features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/users has no role restriction - all authenticated users can list users (by design for supervisor/implant_incharge dropdowns)
POST /api/users correctly restricted to administrator and implant_incharge roles
DELETE /api/users/{id} correctly restricted to administrator and implant_incharge roles
Cannot delete own account check working correctly
Duplicate email prevention working on user creation
All 5 valid roles (student, supervisor, implant_incharge, administrator, nurse) can be created
Dashboard stats endpoint returning correct structure with total/pending/approved/rejected counts
Procedures filter param (pending, completed, rejected) correctly maps to internal status codes
seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Management API fully tested. GET /users allows all authenticated users (needed for dropdown population). POST and DELETE /users restricted to admin/implant_incharge. Self-delete prevention and duplicate email validation working.

tested_features.1_get_users_admin: PASS - GET /api/users returns all users for admin
tested_features.2_post_users_create: PASS - POST /api/users creates new user (admin/implant_incharge only)
tested_features.4_non_admin_403_create: PASS - Student, nurse, supervisor get 403 on POST /users
tested_features.5_non_admin_403_delete: PASS - Student, nurse get 403 on DELETE /users/{id}
tested_features.6_cannot_delete_self: PASS - Admin cannot delete their own account (400)
tested_features.7_duplicate_email: PASS - Duplicate email prevented on create (400)

tested_endpoints.GET /api/users: PASS - Lists all users (no role restriction)
tested_endpoints.POST /api/users: PASS - Creates user (admin/implant_incharge only, 403 for others)
tested_endpoints.DELETE /api/users/{id}: PASS - Deletes user (admin/implant_incharge only, 403 for others)
tested_endpoints.DELETE /api/users/{self_id}: PASS - Returns 400 'Cannot delete your own account'
tested_endpoints.GET /api/procedures?status=pending: PASS - Returns procedures in pending_* statuses
